entries.recipe_text: To two large oranges peeled and picked to pieces, add a cup of sugar. Boil a quart of milk mixed with the yolks of three eggs, and two dessert-spoons of corn-starch. Cool it and stir into it the orange and sugar. Cover it with meringue made of the whites of the eggs, and a little sugar, and brown in the oven.
steps: Peel and pick the oranges into pieces.
Add a cup of sugar to the oranges.
Boil the milk mixed with the egg yolks and corn-starch.
Stir the orange and sugar into the cooled mixture.
Cover with a meringue made of the egg whites and a little sugar.

entries.recipe_text: Grate one dozen ears of corn, not too young. Add one quart milk, four or five beaten eggs, a dessert-spoon of
steps: Add the milk and beaten eggs.
